name: 1b-benchmarker-lint-verify
command: pnpm --filter oando-site exec eslint features/planner/admin/svg-editor/AdminSvgEditorEditView.tsx features/planner/admin/svg-editor/svgPipelineRunner.ts features/planner/open3d/catalog/svg/svgCompiler.server.ts features/planner/open3d/catalog/svg/svgServerSanitizer.ts site/scripts/generate-svg.mjs --max-warnings 50 2>&1 | Select-String -Pattern 'error|warning' | Select-Object -First 5; echo 'LINT_SCOPED_VERIFY_DONE'
